strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq with MCP frameworks
Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
concerns: No explicit Master's or PhD in AI-related field despite preference
Limited evidence of direct cloud platform strategy or customer advisory experience
AI expertise appears project-embedded rather than as a core strategic focus area
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep, hands-on AI and infrastructure engineering experience with tangible contributions to agentic workflows and open-source platforms, alongside strong technical leadership and cross-stack fluency. However, his resume lacks clear evidence of cloud product strategy, customer advisory, or formal AI academic credentials, which are preferred for this director-level AI strategy role.
